hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-serif tracking-tight font-medium text-[#0A192F]
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl font-serif tracking-tight font-medium text-[#0A192F]

spacing_and_layout.surface_treatment: Cardless or extremely subtle 1px border (border-slate-200) with generous p-6 internal padding. Use shadow-sm for elevated components (modals/dropdowns), otherwise keep it flat and elegant.

buttons.primary: bg-[#0A192F] text-white rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-sans font-medium hover:bg-[#1E3A8A] transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#0A192F] border border-[#0A192F] rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-sans font-medium hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors
buttons.gold_accent: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#C5A059] to-[#D4AF37] text-white rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-sans font-medium shadow-md

inputs.style: bg-transparent border-b border-slate-300 rounded-none px-0 py-2 focus:border-[#0A192F] focus:ring-0 font-sans text-base transition-colors

cards.dashboard_widget: bg-white border border-slate-100 rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-[0_2px_10px_rgba(0,0,0,0.02)]

navigation.mobile_bottom_nav: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-slate-100 px-6 py-4 flex justify-between items-center z-50
navigation.desktop_sidebar: w-64 bg-[#F8FAFC] border-r border-slate-100 h-screen sticky top-0 p-6 hidden md:block

charts.stock_donut: Recharts PieChart/Donut. Colors: ['#0A192F', '#1E3A8A', '#D4AF37', '#94A3B8', '#CBD5E1']. Remove axis lines, clean tooltip.
charts.forecast_bar: Recharts BarChart. Use subtle rounded top corners for bars (radius=[4, 4, 0, 0]).

loyalty_tracker.style: Horizontal progress bar or row of 5 circular slots + 1 larger golden slot for the free service. Use lucide-react 'Star' or 'Scissors' icons.

motion.page_load: framer-motion initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} transition={{ duration: 0.4 }}

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text over #D4AF37 meets contrast guidelines. If needed, use #0A192F for text inside gold elements.
accessibility_and_testing.test_ids: Every interactive element MUST have a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-button', data-testid='appointment-submit', data-testid='loyalty-step').

hero_login.description: Elegant premium white salon interior, perfect for the login screen background with a dark blue overlay or elegant glassmorphism card on top.

tools_abstract.description: Flat lay of elegant hairdresser tools on white. Can be used for onboarding, empty states, or service category headers.

instructions_to_main_agent: This app is in French. All copy must be in elegant French (e.g., 'Prendre rendez-vous', 'Tableau de bord', 'Fidélité').
Use 'Cormorant Garamond' for all main headings (h1, h2) to establish the luxury artisan feel, and 'Outfit' for all UI/body text to maintain high legibility.
Mobile-First Layout is CRITICAL. The primary navigation should be a bottom tab bar on mobile screens. Core actions (Add Appointment, Checkout) must be thumb-reachable.

For the '5+1' CRM Loyalty program, design a visually striking element using the accent_gold color (#D4AF37). Show 5 steps (slate-200 to primary blue when filled) and a glowing gold 6th step (Gratuit).
The Dashboard requires a Donut Chart for Stock. Use Recharts via Shadcn. Use the custom colors defined in the charts section.
The URSSAF calculation is 22% of revenue. Place this elegantly in the accounting dashboard with a clear 'Déclarer' action button.
Fuel cost tracker should visually show tiers (2.5€ per 10km).
Never use generic standard HTML inputs. Heavily customize Shadcn inputs to look like premium fields (e.g., bottom border only, or soft gray background with rounded corners).
